name: Critical Service Failure
subject: 🔴 CRITICAL: {{serviceName}} is down
htmlTemplate:
🔴 Service Failure Alert

{{serviceName}} has failed

Error: {{error}}

Timestamp: {{timestamp}}

Severity: {{severity}}

{{#if metadata.url}}

URL: {{metadata.url}}

{{/if}}{{#if metadata.consecutiveFailures}}

Consecutive Failures: {{metadata.consecutiveFailures}}

{{/if}}

Please investigate this issue immediately.

This is an automated message from Control Panel

Do not reply to this email
description: Template para fallos críticos con formato urgente

name: Warning Alert
subject: ⚠️ WARNING: {{serviceName}} - {{error}}
htmlTemplate:
⚠️ Service Warning

{{serviceName}}

Issue: {{error}}

Time: {{timestamp}}

This is a warning alert. The service may still be operational but requires attention.

Control Panel Monitoring System

name: Service Recovered
subject: ✅ RESOLVED: {{serviceName}} is back online
htmlTemplate:
✅ Service Recovered

{{serviceName}} is back online

Recovered at: {{timestamp}}

{{#if metadata.downtime}}

Total downtime: {{metadata.downtime}}

{{/if}}

The service has recovered and is now functioning normally.

Control Panel Monitoring System
description: Template para notificar cuando un servicio se recupera

name: Daily Summary
subject: 📊 Daily Monitoring Summary - {{date}}
htmlTemplate:
📊 Daily Monitoring Summary

{{date}}

{{metadata.totalChecks}}
Total Checks
{{metadata.successful}}
Successful
{{metadata.failed}}
Failed

Summary

Uptime: {{metadata.uptime}}%

All systems operational: {{metadata.allHealthy}}

Control Panel Monitoring System
description: Template para resumen diario de monitoreo
